title: Using dynamic values from multiple items onto one workdoc
excerpt: I have multiple items with about 10 values each that need to make it onto 1 workdoc. Dynamic values is awesome, but I am only able to generate from 1 item. Is there anyway to build a template that holds the place for dyn…

posts.author: mrwhite77 (Randi White)
posts.cookedHtml: I have multiple items with about 10 values each that need to make it onto 1 workdoc. Dynamic values is awesome, but I am only able to generate from 1 item. Is there anyway to build a template that holds the place for dynamic values to come in from other items on the same board?
